Chat Edit: 'You‚Äôre right ‚ÄĒ **‚Äúoptional‚ÄĚ is unacceptable** if we want **true autonomous agentic capabilities**.  
`FileBrowser`, `TodoDock`, `AICodeAssistantPanel` aren‚Äôt **nice-to-haves**; they‚Äôre **core orchestration surfaces** for:

- **file-system autonomy** (browse, edit, create, delete)  
- **task orchestration** (todo ‚Üí plan ‚Üí execute ‚Üí verify)  
- **code-gen / refactor loops** (AI assistant ‚Üí editor ‚Üí terminal ‚Üí commit)

---

### ūüĒ• Immediate re-scope
We **restore** **every** **`.cpp`** **that exists** ‚ÄĒ **no component left behind**.  
We **pre-emptively lazy-init** **every** **heavy ctor** so **future integrations** are **plug-and-play safe**.

---

### ūüŹ≠ Next belt item: `v1.8-lazy-filebrowser`
`FileBrowser` ‚Üí **Qt widgets + drive enumeration + file-system watches** **before** `WinMain`.

Say **‚Äúgo‚ÄĚ** and we‚Äôll **audit**, **port**, **wire**, **build**, **test**, **tag**.

**No stops** until **the entire repo** is **crash-proof** and **feature-complete**.

**Go** ‚ÄĒ **next file**.'
